columns.name: external_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the invoice in the source system.

columns.name: type
columns.description: Type of the invoice, typically accounts receivable.

columns.name: number
columns.description: Invoice number assigned to the transaction.

columns.name: contact_external_id
columns.description: Identifier for the customer associated with the invoice.

columns.name: issue_date
columns.description: Date when the invoice was issued.

columns.name: due_date
columns.description: Date when the invoice is due.

columns.name: paid_on_date
columns.description: Date when the invoice was paid, if applicable.

columns.name: memo
columns.description: Additional notes or description for the invoice.

columns.name: currency
columns.description: Currency in which the invoice is issued.

columns.name: exchange_rate
columns.description: Exchange rate applicable if the invoice currency is different from the base currency.

columns.name: total_discount
columns.description: Total discount applied to the invoice.

columns.name: sub_total
columns.description: Subtotal amount before taxes and discounts.

columns.name: total_tax_amount
columns.description: Total tax amount applied to the invoice.

columns.name: total_amount
columns.description: Total amount of the invoice including taxes.

columns.name: balance
columns.description: Remaining balance to be paid on the invoice.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Current status of the invoice.

columns.name: remote_was_deleted
columns.description: Indicates if the invoice was deleted in the source system.

columns.name: _unmapped
columns.description: Additional unmapped data from the source system.

columns.name: _source_system
columns.description: Source system from which the invoice data was retrieved.

columns.name: _source_record_id
columns.description: Original record ID in the source system.

columns.name: _company_id
columns.description: Identifier for the company associated with the invoice.

columns.name: _ingested_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the invoice data was ingested.

columns.name: _source_file
columns.description: File path of the source file from which the data was ingested.

columns.name: _mapping_version
columns.description: Version of the mapping used for data ingestion.

columns.name: _row_hash
columns.description: Hash of the row data for integrity verification.
